name: Vigil
description: DeFi hard intelligence feeds for AI agents on Base. Six paid endpoints: Chainlink oracle health, liquidation cascade simulation (Aave V3), MEV exposure scoring, real-time sandwich detection, impermanent-loss prediction, plus an agent-service-price oracle. Every paid response carries an Ed25519-signed Proof-of-Context attestation typed as f_i (input freshness) with a declared per-feed horizon.

endpoints.description: Oracle Health: Chainlink feed staleness, deviation from spot, sequencer status. f_i PoC attestation.
Oracle Health (batch): same data for every tracked Chainlink feed on Base. f_i PoC attestation.
Liquidation Cascade Simulation: given a price-drop scenario, return how many positions liquidate, cascade depth, total notional at risk. Aave V3 today, more protocols planned. f_i PoC attestation.
MEV Exposure Score: sandwich-attack risk for a pool given a trade size. f_i PoC attestation.
Real-time Sandwich Detection: is a pool being actively sandwiched right now? f_i PoC attestation.
Predictive Impermanent Loss Risk: projected IL for an LP position over a configurable timeframe. f_i PoC attestation.

differentiators: Every paid response wrapped with Ed25519-signed Proof-of-Context attestation (when POC_SIGNING_KEY is configured) over a canonical-JSON SHA-256 hash with declared per-feed freshness horizon
Cross-language hash equality verified against four reference implementations of the wire format v0.1 spec
First-mover on MEV exposure scoring, sandwich activity detection, and predictive IL risk in the agentic data category (no equivalent x402 service catalogued at agentic.market scan time)
Differentiated from generic price feeds: Vigil specializes in risk signals that DeFi-native agents need, not commodity OHLCV
